desc: ground/foundation slab at y=0 to create a continuous base under building and perimeter wall footing

operations.purpose: ground/foundation slab at y=0 to create a continuous base under building and perimeter wall footing
low perimeter boundary wall (one block tall) around plot at y=1_outline_face_0
low perimeter boundary wall (one block tall) around plot at y=1_outline_face_1
low perimeter boundary wall (one block tall) around plot at y=1_outline_face_2
low perimeter boundary wall (one block tall) around plot at y=1_outline_face_3
low perimeter boundary wall (one block tall) around plot at y=1_outline_face_4
ground-level floor (single-layer wooden floor at y=1) inside foundation
main wall volume using horizontal planks spanning two stories (from y=2 to y=4 inclusive). This creates room height ≈3 blocks per story; will be trimmed by courses and windows.
base skirting (stonebrick band at y=2 in front of walls). Ensures stone belt at base across entire wall footprint
mid-height stone course (stonebrick band at y=4) around building between first and second story
carve interior space for two stories (interior ceiling at y=6). Keeps exterior planks and posts; preserves floor at y=1_outline_face_0
carve interior space for two stories (interior ceiling at y=6). Keeps exterior planks and posts; preserves floor at y=1_outline_face_1
carve interior space for two stories (interior ceiling at y=6). Keeps exterior planks and posts; preserves floor at y=1_outline_face_2
carve interior space for two stories (interior ceiling at y=6). Keeps exterior planks and posts; preserves floor at y=1_outline_face_3
carve interior space for two stories (interior ceiling at y=6). Keeps exterior planks and posts; preserves floor at y=1_outline_face_4
carve interior space for two stories (interior ceiling at y=6). Keeps exterior planks and posts; preserves floor at y=1_outline_face_5
second-story floor/ceiling slab at y=5
entrance opening in perimeter wall at center front (z=0) aligned with building center
front entrance opening in building wall (2-block tall opening at center front) leaving doorway clear for door placement
main roof ridge bulk (stepped nether_brick roof center mass). This is an initial block layer for a stepped gable; trimmed below and above to form slope
stone slab trim around roof edges and tower base; ensures a light stone trim band visible around roof
rear-centered small tower/lantern: wooden walls with log corners and stonebrick trim; interior hollowed for lantern space
